title: Diabolical Delights
description: Diabolical Delights adds a delightful element of surprise and chaos via the Jack O'Bomb item!
body:
Diabolical Delights introduces a wickedly fun and unpredictable item, the "Jack O'Bomb."



The Jack O'Bomb is a mischievous and whimsical explosive item carefully crafted by combining three key ingredients: a Jack O'Lantern, Redstone dust, and gunpowder. When these components are combined in a crafting table, they create a Jack O'Bomb.

Once you've crafted a Jack O'Bomb, the real fun begins. When you throw the Jack O'Bomb, it doesn't simply explode like a regular TNT block. Instead, it unleashes a cascade of random effects upon landing. These effects can range from the comical to the downright diabolical, making each Jack O'Bomb throw a unique and unpredictable experience.

Created for SpookyJam 2023! ![SpookyJam](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mycelium-Mod-Network/SpookyJam-Site/main/public/android-chrome-192x192.png)
List of possible effects: - Speed: Increases your movement speed. - Slowness: Decreases your movement speed. - Haste: Increases mining and attack speed. - Mining Fatigue: Decreases mining and attack speed. - Strength: Increases the damage you deal in melee attacks. - Weakness: Decreases the damage you deal in melee attacks. - Instant Health: Restores your health instantly. - Instant Damage: Inflicts instant damage to your health. - Jump Boost: Allows you to jump higher. - Nausea: Distorts your vision, making it harder to see. - Regeneration: Gradually restores your health over time. - Resistance: Reduces the damage you take from all sources. - Fire Resistance: Provides immunity to damage from fire and lava. - Water Breathing: Allows you to breathe underwater without drowning. - Invisibility: Makes you invisible to other players and mobs. - Blindness: Completely darkens your vision. - Night Vision: Enhances your ability to see in the dark. - Hunger: Drains your hunger bar more quickly. - Weakness: Reduces the damage you deal in melee attacks. - Poison: Gradually reduces your health over time. - Wither: Inflicts damage over time and reduces your health. - Health Boost: Increases your maximum health. - Absorption: Adds extra health points (absorption hearts) to your health bar. - Saturation: Replenishes your hunger bar. - Glowing: Makes you visible through blocks. - Levitation: Causes you to float upwards. - Slow Falling: Slows your fall, reducing fall damage. - Conduit Power: Provides underwater vision and improved mining underwater when near a conduit. - Dolphin's Grace: Increases swimming speed. - Bad Omen: Triggers a raid when you enter a village. - Hero of the Village: Grants discounted trades with villagers after successfully defending a village from a raid.
